blocks.content: She held Kit's hand the whole time. He didn't move.
Somewhere in the middle of the explanation she stopped hearing the words and started hearing only the sound of them.
There were things the doctor said about the body. About next steps, about time, about the fact that this was not something either of them had done or failed to do.
They walked to the car. He opened her door. He got in on his side. He sat for a moment with both hands on the wheel and did not start the engine.
The parking structure was quiet at nine in the morning. The sound of the city existed somewhere far above them.
She reached across and put her hand over his on the wheel and they sat in the concrete quiet.
After a while he started the car.
